header.title:
Built by engineers.
Driven by outcomes.
header.description: Founded in 2020, Trai Inc is an AI-native engineering team that ships Silicon Valley-grade software in weeks — not months. 138+ clients. 12+ industries. Zero bloat. We exist to democratize enterprise-grade engineering for businesses worldwide.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.text: To democratize enterprise-grade software engineering — making Silicon Valley-quality development accessible to businesses of every size, everywhere.

vision.label: Our Vision
vision.text: A world where great software is defined by the problem it solves, not the budget behind it. We're building the team and tools to make that real.

values.title: Ship Over Slide Decks
values.desc: Working software wins. We measure progress in deployments, not presentations.

values.title: Radical Transparency
values.desc: Fixed prices. Weekly updates. Full code ownership. No surprises, no fine print.

values.title: Engineer First, Always
values.desc: Every decision passes through engineering rigor — from architecture to client communication.

values.title: AI as a Multiplier
values.desc: We don't replace engineers with AI. We arm engineers with AI to ship faster and smarter.

team.subtitle: LEADERSHIP TEAM
team.title: The engineers and strategists behind our platform

members.name: Tushar Rai
members.tagline: Engineer turned founder. Obsessed with shipping.

members.name: Neha Sharma
members.tagline: Leads architecture across web and mobile.

members.name: Harsh Pandey
members.tagline: AWS, Cloudflare, and infrastructure at scale.

model.subtitle: HOW WE WORK
model.title: AI-Native Delivery at Scale
model.description: We combine deep engineering expertise with AI-powered development tools to deliver faster, cleaner, and more cost-effective solutions than traditional agencies.

advantages.title: Dedicated Team & Point of Contact
advantages.desc: Every project gets a named project manager and senior engineers from day one. Weekly written updates, scheduled calls — one clear point of contact, not a rotating cast.

advantages.title: AI-Augmented Speed
advantages.desc: Our team uses Claude, Gemini, and agentic coding workflows to deliver enterprise-quality work in half the time of traditional agencies.

advantages.title: Fixed-Price Transparency
advantages.desc: Every project is scoped upfront with a fixed price. No hourly billing, no surprise invoices, no scope creep.

advantages.title: Full IP Ownership
advantages.desc: You own 100% of the code, design assets, and infrastructure. Complete handover with documentation. Zero vendor lock-in.

milestones.title: Founded Trai Inc
milestones.desc: Launched as a digital marketing and software development firm in Lucknow, serving local businesses and startups.

milestones.title: Scaled to 50+ Clients
milestones.desc: Expanded service offerings and team. Delivered websites, marketing campaigns, and software across hospitality, retail, and real estate.

milestones.title: Enterprise & International Expansion
milestones.desc: Took on enterprise clients and expanded to international markets including the UK. Crossed 100+ total projects delivered.

milestones.title: AI-Native Transformation
milestones.desc: Adopted AI-augmented development workflows across the team. Integrated Claude, Gemini, and agentic coding tools. Launched intern incubation program training engineers on production projects from day one.

milestones.title: 138+ Clients & Product Launch
milestones.desc: Crossed 138+ clients served. Began developing a proprietary SaaS product to scale the tools and systems that power client delivery.

items.q: How long has Trai Inc been in business?
items.a: We've been building production software since 2020 — six years and 138+ clients across 12+ industries, from local MSMEs to enterprise operations.

items.q: Do you outsource work or use junior developers?
items.a: No. Every project is built by our senior in-house team — no outsourcing, no junior-only bench. Your dedicated project manager coordinates directly with those engineers on your behalf.

items.q: Who will I actually be talking to during my project?
items.a: A dedicated project manager, assigned from day one. They coordinate with the senior engineers building your product and give you weekly written updates — so you always have one clear point of contact, not a rotating cast.

items.q: What's your policy on code and IP ownership?
items.a: You own everything, full stop — it's core to how we operate, not a clause we hope you never read. We've published a public due-diligence checklist so you can verify our commitments on code ownership, app store accounts, and hosting before you even sign.

cta.title: Ready to Build Something Exceptional?
cta.description: Tell us about your project. Our team will scope it and deliver a fixed-price proposal within 48 hours.
